overview.name: Variations Http
overview.description:
This scenario verifies API behavior with different input variations.
Test flow includes: 1. Load variation data from CSV file. 2. Send POST request with payload using variation variables. 3. Verify POST response = 201. 4. Extract created entity ID. 5. Send GET request by ID. 6. Verify entity exists and matches variation data.
This scenario validates: - Dynamic variable substitution - Data-driven testing via CSV - Independent execution per variation row - Response correctness for different inputs

http.comment: Step 1-3. Create entity using variation data
Step 5-6. Verify entity created from variation
